tools.Name: Deep-Live-Cam
tools.Description: A real-time face-swapping and deepfake tool that works with a single image.
tools.Use_Case: Creating engaging video content, meme generation, and real-time face swapping during live streams.

tools.Name: /last30days
tools.Description: An AI agent that researches topics across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, and prediction markets to synthesize grounded summaries.
tools.Use_Case: Prompt research, trend discovery, product research, and competitive intelligence gathering.

tools.Name: AgentScope
tools.Description: A production-ready framework for building multi-agent systems with support for memory, planning, and tool use.
tools.Use_Case: Developing complex agentic workflows, multi-agent games, and automated research systems.
